description_long: This object is a bottle with a geometric, polygonal body and a short, octagonal neck topped by a faceted cap. The main body is mostly gray and appears to be made of a matte, hard material, possibly plastic or metal. The front face features a recessed, circular opening with a blue, iris-like detail at its center, suggesting a decorative or functional element. The sides and back of the bottle are plain, with the opening only visible from the front. The overall shape is angular, with beveled edges and a flat base for stable placement. There are no visible labels, branding, or additional features on the exterior.
description: A polygonal gray bottle with a faceted cap and a circular, blue-detailed opening on the front. The body is angular and matte, with no visible labels or branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the recessed circular opening with a blue iris-like detail at the center.
description_view_1: Side view with the opening visible but the blue detail less prominent; the cap and body shape are clear.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, polygonal surface with no opening or details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with the opening visible but no blue detail.
